---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    formats: ipynb,Rmd
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.14.5
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

```{python}
# QUBIC packages
import qubic
# import pymaster as nmt
from qubicpack.utilities import Qubic_DataDir
from qubic import QubicSkySim as qss
from pysimulators import FitsArray
from qubic import fibtools as ft
from qubic import camb_interface as qc
from qubic import SpectroImLib as si
from qubic import mcmc
from qubic import AnalysisMC as amc

import sys
sys.path.append('/home/tom/mypackages')
import frequency_acquisition as Acq

# Display packages
import healpy as hp
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import gc

# General packages
import numpy as np
import importlib
from pyoperators import *
import copy
import random
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
def integration(nu_min, nu_max, Nintegr, sky_config, d, fwhm_subbands = None):
    print(f'Integration from {nu_min:.2f} to {nu_max:.2f} GHz with {Nintegr} steps')
    obj = Acq.QubicIntegrated(d, Nsub=Nintegr, Nrec=Nintegr)
    if Nintegr == 1:
        allnus = np.array([np.mean([nu_min, nu_max])])
    else:
        allnus = np.linspace(nu_min, nu_max, Nintegr)
    m = obj.get_PySM_maps(sky_config, nus=allnus)
    
    if fwhm_subbands is not None:
        for i in range(Nintegr):
            C = HealpixConvolutionGaussianOperator(fwhm=fwhm_subbands[i])
            m[i] = C(m[i])
    
    return np.array([np.mean(m, axis=0)])
```

```{python}
# PyOperators packages
from pyoperators import (
    BlockColumnOperator, BlockDiagonalOperator, BlockRowOperator,
    CompositionOperator, DiagonalOperator, I, IdentityOperator,
    MPIDistributionIdentityOperator, MPI, proxy_group, ReshapeOperator,
    rule_manager, pcg, Operator)

from pysimulators.interfaces.healpy import HealpixConvolutionGaussianOperator
```

```{python}
# usefull variables
importlib.reload(Acq)
nside = 256
band = 150
relative_bandwidth = 0.25
noiseless = True
noise = False
effective_duration = 3
noise_qubic_level = 1
noise_planck_level = 1
noise_qubicplanck_level = 0 #1e-15

npointings = 1000
Nf_TOD = 1
Nf_recon = 1
fact_sub = 1

maxiter = 150
tol = 1e-40
```

```{python}
# fill the dict

dictfilename = 'dicts/pipeline_demo.dict'

# Read dictionary chosen
d_TOD = qubic.qubicdict.qubicDict()
d_TOD.read_from_file(dictfilename)

d_TOD['nf_recon'] = Nf_TOD
d_TOD['nf_sub'] = Nf_TOD
d_TOD['nside'] = nside
npix=12*d_TOD['nside']**2
d_TOD['RA_center'] = 0
d_TOD['DEC_center'] = -57
center = qubic.equ2gal(d_TOD['RA_center'], d_TOD['DEC_center'])
d_TOD['effective_duration'] = effective_duration
d_TOD['npointings'] = npointings
d_TOD['filter_nu'] = band * 1e9
d_TOD['photon_noise'] = False
d_TOD['noiseless'] = True
d_TOD['config'] = 'FI'
d_TOD['MultiBand'] = True
d_TOD['planck'] = True
d_TOD['dtheta'] = 15
```

```{python}
# Create the two dicts for 150 & 220 GHz
d150 = d_TOD
d220 = copy.deepcopy(d_TOD)
d220['filter_nu'] = 220 * 1e9
```

```{python}
# Acquisition configuration
Nf_TOD = 1
Nf_recon = 1
fact_sub = 1

sky_config = {'cmb':1}#, 'dust':'d0'}
```

```{python}
# Qubic acquisitions
qubic_acquisition_150 = Acq.QubicIntegrated(d150, Nsub=Nf_recon*fact_sub, Nrec=Nf_recon)
qubic_acquisition_220 = Acq.QubicIntegrated(d220, Nsub=Nf_recon*fact_sub, Nrec=Nf_recon)

# Create the wide band acquisition
qubic_acquisition = Acq.QubicWideBand(qubic_acquisition_150, qubic_acquisition_220)

# Create Nsub map
m_sub = qubic_acquisition_150.get_PySM_maps(sky_config, nus = qubic_acquisition.nueff)

# Create the QUBIC scene
scene = qubic_acquisition.scene
```

```{python}
# Create coverage
coverage = qubic_acquisition.get_coverage()
seenpix = coverage/coverage.max() > 0.0001
```

```{python}
# Planck acquisitions
planck_acquisition_150 = Acq.PlanckAcquisition(143, scene)
planck_acquisition_220 = Acq.PlanckAcquisition(217, scene)

# Joint acquisition
qubicplanck_acquisition = Acq.QubicPlanckMultiBandAcquisition(qubic_acquisition, [planck_acquisition_150, planck_acquisition_220])
```

```{python}
# QUBIC Planck operators
H_qp = qubicplanck_acquisition.get_operator()
invN_qp = qubicplanck_acquisition.get_invntt_operator()
```

```{python}
TOD = H_qp(m_sub) + qubicplanck_acquisition.get_noise() * noise_qubicplanck_level
```

```{python}
A = H_qp.T * invN_qp * H_qp
b = H_qp.T * invN_qp * TOD
```

```{python}
solution = pcg(A, b, x0=m_sub, disp=True, tol=tol, maxiter=maxiter)
```

```{python}
# Visualize the first sub-band at 150 Ghz
# %matplotlib inline
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 10))

# m_sub[:, ~seenpix, :] = hp.UNSEEN
# solution['x'][~seenpix, :] = hp.UNSEEN
stk = ['I', 'Q', 'U']

k=0
reso=25
for i in range(3):
    if i == 0:
        m = 300
        minr = 20
    else:
        m = 8
        minr = 8
        
    hp.gnomview(m_sub[0, :, i], rot=center, reso=reso, cmap='jet', sub=(3, 3, k+1), min=-m, max=m, title=f'{stk[i]} - Input')
    hp.gnomview(solution['x'][0, :, i], rot=center, reso=reso, cmap='jet', sub=(3, 3, k+2), min=-m, max=m, title=f'{stk[i]} - Output')
    residuals = solution['x'][0, :, i]-m_sub[0, :, i]
    #residuals[~seenpix] = hp.UNSEEN
    hp.gnomview(residuals, rot=center, reso=reso, cmap='jet', sub=(3, 3, k+3), min=-minr, max=minr, title=f'{stk[i]} - Residuals')
    k+=3

plt.show()
```

```{python}
solution_qubic = solution['x'].copy()
m_sub_qubic = m_sub.copy()
for i in range(npix):
    if seenpix[i] == False:
        solution_qubic[:, i, :] = 0
        m_sub_qubic[:, i, :] = 0
```

```{python}
from qubic import NamasterLib as nam
```

```{python}
namaster = nam.Namaster(weight_mask = seenpix, lmin = 40, lmax = 2*nside-1, delta_ell = 35)
```

```{python}
solution_first_band = solution_qubic[0]
```

```{python}
sky_map = m_sub_qubic[0]
```

```{python}
_, spectra, _ = namaster.get_spectra(solution_first_band.T)
```

```{python}
_, spectra_th, _ = namaster.get_spectra(sky_map.T)
```

```{python}
spectra_TT, spectra_EE, spectra_BB, spectra_TE = spectra[:, 0], spectra[:, 1], spectra[:, 2], spectra[:, 3]
```

```{python}
spectra_th_TT, spectra_th_EE, spectra_th_BB, spectra_th_TE = spectra_th[:, 0], spectra_th[:, 1], spectra_th[:, 2], spectra_th[:, 3]
```

```{python}
# %matplotlib inline
plt.plot(spectra_BB)
```

```{python}
plt.plot(spectra_th_BB - spectra_BB)
```

```{python}
def ana_likelihood(rv, leff, fakedata, errors, model, prior, 
                   mylikelihood=mcmc.LogLikelihood, covariance_model_funct=None, otherp=None):
    ll = mylikelihood(xvals=leff, yvals=fakedata, errors=errors, 
                            model = model, flatprior=prior, covariance_model_funct=covariance_model_funct) 
    like = np.zeros_like(rv)
    for i in range(len(rv)):
        like[i] = np.exp(ll([rv[i]]))
        #print(rv[i],ll([rv[i]]),like[i])
    cumint = scipy.integrate.cumtrapz(like, x=rv)
    cumint = cumint / np.max(cumint)
    onesigma = np.interp(0.68, cumint, rv[1:])
    if otherp:
        other = np.interp(otherp, cumint, rv[1:])
        return like, cumint, onesigma, other
    else:
        return like, cumint, onesigma
```

```{python}
def explore_like(leff, mcl_noise, errors, lmin, dl, cc, rv, otherp=None,
                 cov=None, plotlike=False, plotcls=False, 
                 verbose=False, sample_variance=True, mytitle='', color=None, mylabel='',my_ylim=None):
    
    ### Create Namaster Object
    # Unfortunately we need to recalculate fsky for calculating sample variance
    nside = 256
    lmax = 2 * nside - 1
    if cov is None:
        Namaster = nam.Namaster(None, lmin=lmin, lmax=lmax, delta_ell=dl)
        Namaster.fsky = 0.018
    else:
        okpix = cov > (np.max(cov) * float(cc))
        maskpix = np.zeros(12*nside**2)
        maskpix[okpix] = 1
        Namaster = nam.Namaster(maskpix, lmin=lmin, lmax=lmax, delta_ell=dl)
    
#     print('Fsky: {}'.format(Namaster.fsky))
    lbinned, b = Namaster.get_binning(nside)
    ### Bibnning CambLib
#     binned_camblib = qc.bin_camblib(Namaster, '../../scripts/QubicGeneralPaper2020/camblib.pickle', 
#                                     nside, verbose=False)
    binned_camblib = qc.bin_camblib(Namaster, global_dir + '/doc/CAMB/camblib.pkl', 
                                    nside, verbose=False)
    ### Redefine the function for getting binned Cls
    def myclth(ell,r):
        clth = qc.get_Dl_fromlib(ell, r, lib=binned_camblib, unlensed=False)[0]
        return clth
    allfakedata = myclth(leff, 0.)
    
    ### And we need a fast one for BB only as well
    def myBBth(ell, r):
        clBB = qc.get_Dl_fromlib(ell, r, lib=binned_camblib, unlensed=False, specindex=2)[0]
        return clBB
    ### Fake data
    fakedata = myBBth(leff, 0.)        
    
    if sample_variance:
        covariance_model_funct = Namaster.knox_covariance
    else:
        covariance_model_funct = None
        
    if otherp is None:
        like, cumint, allrlim = ana_likelihood(rv, leff, fakedata, 
                                            errors, 
                                            myBBth, [[0,1]],
                                           covariance_model_funct=covariance_model_funct)
    else:
        like, cumint, allrlim, other = ana_likelihood(rv, leff, fakedata, 
                                            errors, 
                                            myBBth, [[0,1]],
                                           covariance_model_funct=covariance_model_funct, otherp=otherp)
    if plotcls:
        if plotlike:
            subplot(1,2,1)
            if np.ndim(BBcov) == 2:
                errorstoplot = np.sqrt(np.diag(errors))
            else:
                errorstoplot = errors
        #plot(inputl, inputcl[:,2], 'k', label='r=0')
        plot(leff, errorstoplot, label=mylabel+' Errors', color=color)
        xlim(0,lmax)
        if my_ylim is None:
            ylim(1e-4,1e0)
        else:
            ylim(my_ylim[0], my_ylim[1])
        yscale('log')
        xlabel('$\\ell$')
        ylabel('$D_\\ell$')
        legend(loc='upper left')
    if plotlike:
        if plotcls:
            subplot(1,2,2)
        p=plot(rv, like/np.max(like), 
               label=mylabel+' $\sigma(r)={0:6.4f}$'.format(allrlim), color=color)
        plot(allrlim+np.zeros(2), [0,1.2], ':', color=p[0].get_color())
        xlabel('r')
        ylabel('posterior')
        legend(fontsize=8, loc='upper right')
        xlim(0,0.1)
        ylim(0,1.2)
        title(mytitle)
    
    if otherp is None:
        return like, cumint, allrlim
    else:
        return like, cumint, allrlim, other
```

```{python}
rv = np.linspace(0,1,1000)
```

```{python}
lmin, lmax = 40, 2*nside-1
lell = np.arange(lmin, lmax)
```

```{python}
f0, f2 = namaster.get_fields(solution_first_band.T)

f0bis = f0
f2bis = f2

b = namaster.get_binning(nside)

# Make workspaces
w00 = nmt.NmtWorkspace()
w00.compute_coupling_matrix(f0, f0bis, b)

w22 = nmt.NmtWorkspace()
w22.compute_coupling_matrix(f2, f2bis, b)

w02 = nmt.NmtWorkspace()
w02.compute_coupling_matrix(f0, f2bis, b)
w = [w00, w22, w02]
  
# Get Cls
c00 = namaster.compute_master(f0, f0bis, w00)
c22 = namaster.compute_master(f2, f2bis, w22)
c02 = namaster.compute_master(f0, f2bis, w02)

cl = [c00, c22, c02]
```

```{python}
d00 = namaster.bin_spectra(c00, nside)
d02 = namaster.bin_spectra(c02, nside)
d22 = namaster.bin_spectra(c22, nside)

dl = [d00, d22, d02]
```

```{python}
mcl_noise = np.zeros(3)

mcl_noise[:] = mean(dl[:])

```

```{python}

```

```{python}
# Create a list which will contains residuals
residual = []
for stk_index in range(3):
    residuals = solution['x'][:, :, stk_index]-m_sub[:, :, stk_index]
    residual.append(residuals)
```

```{python}
print(np.shape(residual))
```

```{python}
xx, yyI, yyQ, yyU = qss.get_angular_profile(np.array([residual[0][0], residual[1][0], residual[2][0]]).T, nbins=30, separate=True, center=center, thmax=30)
plt.plot(xx, yyI, 'r.', label='I')
plt.plot(xx, yyQ, 'b*', label='Q')
plt.plot(xx, yyU, 'gs', label='U')
plt.xlabel("Degrees")
plt.ylabel('RMS')
plt.legend()
plt.show()
```

```{python}
# Select the sub-band of interest
sub_band_index = 0

# Select the Stokes parameter of interest
stk_i_index = 0
stk_q_index = 1
stk_u_index = 2
```

```{python}
print(np.shape(residual))
```

```{python}
cov_res = np.zeros((3,Nf_TOD, Nf_TOD))
plt.rc('font', size=10)
plt.rc('figure', figsize=(20, 5))
for i in range(3):
    plt.subplot(1,3,i+1)
    cov_res[i,:,:] = np.cov(residual[i][:][:])
    plt.imshow(cov_res[i,:,:])
    plt.xlabel('sub_band', fontsize = 20)
    plt.ylabel('sub_band', fontsize = 20)
    plt.title(stk[i], fontsize = 30)
    plt.colorbar()
plt.tight_layout()
```

```{python}
cov = np.zeros((3,Nf_TOD,Nf_TOD))
plt.rc('font', size=10)
plt.rc('figure', figsize=(20, 5))
for i in range(3):
    plt.subplot(1,3,i+1)
    cov[i,:,:] = np.cov(solution['x'][:,:,i])
    plt.imshow(cov[i,:,:])
    plt.xlabel('sub_band', fontsize = 20)
    plt.ylabel('sub_band', fontsize = 20)
    plt.title(stk[i], fontsize = 30)
    plt.colorbar()
plt.tight_layout()
```

```{python}
corr = np.zeros((3,Nf_TOD,Nf_TOD))
plt.rc('font', size=10)
plt.rc('figure', figsize=(20, 5))
for i in range(3):
    plt.subplot(1,3,i+1)
    corr[i,:,:] = np.corrcoef(solution['x'][:,:,i])
    plt.imshow(corr[i,:,:])
    plt.xlabel('sub_band', fontsize = 20)
    plt.ylabel('sub_band', fontsize = 20)
    plt.title(stk[i], fontsize = 30)
    plt.colorbar()
plt.tight_layout()
```
